local_sources: Open-item lists, ledgers, journals, bank statements, payment orders, factoring and compensation evidence

codex_context.purpose: Resolve source roles and material accounting assumptions
codex_context.content: File inventory, column headers, representative rows, user instructions and unresolved mappings
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Use inventory, headers and representative rows rather than complete populations when resolving mappings

codex_context.purpose: Review reconciliation exceptions and evidence quality
codex_context.content: Deterministic reconciliation results, exception rows, evidence locators and selected supporting excerpts
codex_context.minimum_necessary: Expose exception rows and targeted evidence, not complete source files

residual_risks.risk: Selected accounting rows and supporting excerpts may contain counterparties or case-specific facts
residual_risks.mitigation: Keep complete populations local and send Codex only mappings, exceptions and targeted evidence needed for review

commercialista_notice.message_it: I file contabili completi e la riconciliazione restano locali. Codex esamina mappature, eccezioni e le sole evidenze mirate necessarie alla revisione.
commercialista_notice.message_en: Complete accounting files and reconciliation processing remain local. Codex reviews mappings, exceptions and only the targeted evidence needed for review.

limitations: Actual context depends on the user's instructions and the evidence needed to resolve exceptions
This is a design-time data-flow review, not a GDPR legal determination
